antiBacklash.label: anti-backlash
antiBacklash.tooltip: for better flat surface finish use micro-movements to cancel backlash in solid layer output in millimeters 0 to disable if your firmware has M425 put that in the gcode header and leave this as 0

deviceZMax.label: Z axis speed limit
deviceZMax.tooltip: maximum Z axis speed in millimeters / second 0 to disable

fdmArcEnabled.label: arc output
fdmArcEnabled.tooltip: EXPERIMENTAL: enable path to arc conversion

fdmArcResolution.label: arc resolution
fdmArcResolution.tooltip: change in line direction aceptible in an arc consider values around 5 High values may cause unexpected behavior

fdmArcTolerance.label: arc tolerance
fdmArcTolerance.tooltip: convert cicrular paths to arcs; center point drift tolerance when matching arc points consider values around 0.15 in mm, or 0.006 inches; High values may cause unexpected behavior 0 to disable

firstLayerBedTemp.label: bed temp
firstLayerBedTemp.tooltip: degrees in celsius output setting used when this is zero

firstLayerBeltBump.label: anchor bump
firstLayerBeltBump.tooltip: add a bump to the start of an anchor to help it peel off at the end of the belt in millimeters

firstLayerBeltLead.label: part anchor
firstLayerBeltLead.tooltip: belt part anchor at start of print in millimeters

firstLayerBrim.label: brim sides
firstLayerBrim.tooltip: add brim to part perimeter size is width in millimeters 0 to disable

firstLayerBrimGap.label: brim gap
firstLayerBrimGap.tooltip: spacing between brim and part in millimeters

firstLayerBrimIn.label: brim interior
firstLayerBrimIn.tooltip: add brim to part interior when interior voids exist size is width in millimeters 0 to disable

firstLayerBrimTrig.label: brim trigger
firstLayerBrimTrig.tooltip: add brims only when segment facing belt is shorter than this value in millimeters 0 = Infinity

firstLayerFillRate.label: fill speed
firstLayerFillRate.tooltip: fill printing max speed in millimeters / second

firstLayerFlatten.label: flatten
firstLayerFlatten.tooltip: flatten to the belt any point height less than this value in millimeters

firstLayerNozzleTemp.label: nozzle temp
firstLayerNozzleTemp.tooltip: degrees in celsius output setting used when this is zero

firstLayerRate.label: shell speed
firstLayerRate.tooltip: shell printing max speed in millimeters / second

firstLayerYOffset.label: belt offset
firstLayerYOffset.tooltip: height offset from belt of lowest extrusion in millimeters

firstSliceHeight.label: layer height
firstSliceHeight.tooltip: height of each slice in millimeters should be >= slice height

gcodeTime.label: output time factor
gcodeTime.tooltip: modifier to print time estimates in the gcode export dialog. raise or lower value based on your predicted vs observed print times

outputAlternating.label: alternating
outputAlternating.tooltip: alternate shell winding order clockwise / counter-clockwise may reduce warping in thin areas and help with belt edge adhesion

outputAvoidGaps.label: avoid gaps
outputAvoidGaps.tooltip: route around gaps rather than perform a retract when possible

outputBeltFirst.label: belt first
outputBeltFirst.tooltip: always print shells touching the belt before any other shells. this is no longer a recommended setting based on extensive testing.

outputBrimCount.label: skirt count
outputBrimCount.tooltip: number of first-layer offset brims to generate

outputBrimOffset.label: skirt offset
outputBrimOffset.tooltip: skirt offset from part in millimeters when rafts are used this is the raft offset

outputCoastDist.label: shell coast
outputCoastDist.tooltip: non-printing end of perimeter shells in millimeters

outputDraftShield.label: draft shield
outputDraftShield.tooltip: extend skirt to height of part which acts as a shield against drafts and traps hot air

outputFanLayer.label: fan on layer
outputFanLayer.tooltip: layer # to turn on fan layers start at 0

outputFeedrate.label: print speed
outputFeedrate.tooltip: max printing speed set to 0 to use default millimeters / second

outputFinishrate.label: finish speed
outputFinishrate.tooltip: outermost shell speed bridge/flat solid layers set to 0 to use default millimeters / second

outputLoops.label: loop count
outputLoops.tooltip: number of times to repeat the selected range or the entire print if no range

outputMaxFlowrate.label: max flowrate
outputMaxFlowrate.tooltip: maximum volumetric flowrate supported by this print head and filament in millimeters^3 / second

outputMinLayerTime.label: min layer time
outputMinLayerTime.tooltip: minimum allowable layer print time in seconds. printing will be slowed if the layer would outerwise complete in fewer seconds. 0 = disabled

outputPurgeTower.label: purge tower
outputPurgeTower.tooltip: purge tower area in mm^2 for multi extruder setups 0 = disabled

outputRaft.label: raft enable
outputRaft.tooltip: create a raft under the model for better adhesion uses skirt offset and disables skirt output

outputRaftSpacing.label: raft gap
outputRaftSpacing.tooltip: additional layer spacing between 1st layer and raft in millimeters

outputRetractDist.label: retract distance
outputRetractDist.tooltip: amount to retract filament for long moves. in millimeters

outputRetractDwell.label: engage dwell
outputRetractDwell.tooltip: time between re-engaging filament and movement in milliseconds

outputRetractSpeed.label: retract rate
outputRetractSpeed.tooltip: speed of filament retraction in mm/s

outputRetractWipe.label: retract wipe
outputRetractWipe.tooltip: non-printing move after retraction in millimeters

outputScarfLength.label: scarf length
outputScarfLength.tooltip: ease up length for scarf joint. disables arc detection 0 = disabled

outputSeekrate.label: move speed
outputSeekrate.tooltip: non-print move speed millimeters / second 0 = enable G0 moves

outputShortPoly.label: short path
outputShortPoly.tooltip: polygons shorter than this will have their print speed scaled down to min speed in millimeters

sliceAdaptive.label: adaptive height
sliceAdaptive.tooltip: use adaptive layer heights with 'layer height' as max and 'layer min' as the min

sliceBottomLayers.label: base layers
sliceBottomLayers.tooltip: number of solid layers at bottom of the print or under bridge spans

sliceCompInner.label: shell inner offset
sliceCompInner.tooltip: inner hole perimeter offset in millimeters

sliceCompOuter.label: shell outer offset
sliceCompOuter.tooltip: outer wall perimeter offset in millimeters

sliceDetectThin.label: thin walls
sliceDetectThin.tooltip: detect and fill gaps between shell walls

sliceFillAngle.label: start angle
sliceFillAngle.tooltip: starting angle in degrees 90 degrees added to  each following layer applies only to solid layers

sliceFillGrow.label: expand
sliceFillGrow.tooltip: expand projected solids can help with solid areas over sparse infill areas units in millimeters

sliceFillOverlap.label: fill overlap
sliceFillOverlap.tooltip: overlap between shells and solid or sparse infill. can improve bonding to shells as fraction of line width 0.0 - 1.0

sliceFillRepeat.label: fill repeat
sliceFillRepeat.tooltip: number of times to repeat unchanged fill layers

sliceHeight.label: layer height
sliceHeight.tooltip: height of each slice layer in millimeters

sliceLayerStart.label: start point
sliceLayerStart.tooltip: layer starting point last = where last layer ended center = part center origin = device origin random = yolo

sliceLineWidth.label: line width
sliceLineWidth.tooltip: extrusion width in millimeters 0 = nozzle diameter

sliceMinHeight.label: layer minimum
sliceMinHeight.tooltip: adaptive min layer height in millimeters must be non-zero

sliceShellOrder.label: shell order
sliceShellOrder.tooltip: output shell order inside to outside or outside to inside affects surface quality

sliceShells.label: shell count
sliceShells.tooltip: number of perimeter walls to generate

sliceSolidify.label: solidify
sliceSolidify.tooltip: remove inner voids treat the model as a solid

sliceSolidMinArea.label: min area
sliceSolidMinArea.tooltip: minimum area (mm^2) bridges and flats less than this are culled

sliceSolidMinThick.label: min thick
sliceSolidMinThick.tooltip: minimum area thickness which is a ratio of area to perimeter for layer differences which are used to find bridges and flat areas values from 0.0 - 0.5 work best

sliceSupportAngle.label: angle
sliceSupportAngle.tooltip: max overhang angle before supporting pillar is generated normal values 45-60 belt values 0-10

sliceSupportExtra.label: expand
sliceSupportExtra.tooltip: expand support area beyond part boundary in millimeters

sliceSupportGap.label: layer gap
sliceSupportGap.tooltip: add a layer gap between support and part

sliceSupportNozzle.label: tool
sliceSupportNozzle.tooltip: in multi-extruder systems the toolhead to use for support material

sliceSupportOutline.label: enclosed
sliceSupportOutline.tooltip: enclose support pattern inside a perimeter shell

sliceTopLayers.label: top layers
sliceTopLayers.tooltip: number of solid layers at the top of the print or on flat areas facing up

sliceZInterleave.label: interleave z
sliceZInterleave.tooltip: interleave Z heights with odd number shells

zHopDistance.label: z hop distance
zHopDistance.tooltip: amount to raise z on retraction moves in millimeters 0 to disable
